daily_reflection.title: Daily Reflection
daily_reflection.description: A positive deed or gratitude entry recorded by the user daily.

id.description: Unique identifier of the reflection record.

date.description: The date of the reflection in YYYY-MM-DD format.

timestamp.description: Epoch timestamp of when the entry was logged.

text.description: The description of the deed or gratitude experience.

category.description: Whether this indicates a positive deed or an expression of gratitude.

prayer_track_day.title: Prayer Day Log
prayer_track_day.description: Daily logged prayer status updates for Fajr, Dhuhr, Asr, Maghrib, Isha, Tahajjud, and Witr.

date.description: The date of the prayer log in YYYY-MM-DD format.

notes.description: Personal notes or insights logged for the day.

user_public_profile.title: User Public Profile
user_public_profile.description: Public identifier for safe non-PII data sharing.

districtId.description: Default selected Bangladesh district ID for prayer offset calculations.

user_private_pii.title: User Private PII
user_private_pii.description: Personally Identifiable Information isolated for secure owner-only read/write access.

/users/{userId}/reflections/{reflectionI.description: Saves daily deed and gratitude reflections for the user.

/users/{userId}/prayer_logs/{date}.description: User's daily logged history for the five daily obligatory and optional prayers.

/users/{userId}/public/profile.description: Safe display settings and non-sensitive configs.
